translations.en: a doddering old woman.
translations.zh: 一位步履蹣跚的老婦人。

translations.en: "Who are you and what d'ye want?"
"Eh? Speak up!"
"Eh? What foolishness is this?"
"There ain't no dead person here!"
"My name's @Tobatha."
"But you can call me @maam, youngster."
"That's @maam to you, youngster. Respect your elders!"
translations.zh: 「對我得叫@老太太，年輕人，尊老愛幼！」

translations.en: "That's better. Now, what did you want?"
"Job? I'm a mender of the @inflicted!"
translations.zh: 「職業？老身是治療@患難者之人！」

translations.en: "If I weren't, why would you be here?"
"Now stop this foolishness and tell me what you want, youngster."
translations.zh: 「莫再胡鬧，年輕人，說吧，汝要什麼。」

translations.en: "I can @heal, @cure, and even @raise dead!"
translations.zh: 「老身能@治傷、@解毒，甚至@起死回生！」

translations.en: "Oh, sure! Thou art just trying to get on my good side."
translations.zh: 「哦，是嘛！汝不過是想討老身歡心罷了。」

translations.en: "Well, it won't work!"
"Hmph! And not so much as a @thank-you."
"Well, that's kids today for ye! No manners, the lot of 'em!"
translations.zh: 「這就是現在的年輕人！一個個都沒禮貌！」

translations.en: "Well, what can I do for thee?"
"Don't bother me with that!"
"What do you mean, heal? Thou art not wounded!"
"What do you mean, heal? None of you are wounded!"
translations.zh: 「說什麼治傷？汝等沒有一個受傷！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
"Aye, I see thy wound, $Y."
"Wilt thou make an offering of 30 gold?"
Laying hands upon $Y, Tobatha mends the wounds.
translations.zh: 托芭莎將手覆於$Y身上，為其療傷。

translations.en: "Well, if thou wilt not pay, why should I heal thee?"
translations.zh: 「哼，若汝不肯付錢，老身憑何替汝治傷？」

translations.en: "You youngsters think everything should be free!"
translations.zh: 「汝等年輕人以為什麼都是免費的！」

translations.en: "Thou art not too bad, for a youngster."
"All right, I'll heal ye."
Laying hands upon $Y, Tobatha mends the wounds.
translations.zh: 托芭莎將手覆於$Y身上，為其療傷。

translations.en: "What else ya want?"
"What do you mean, cure? Thou art not poisoned!"
"What do you mean, cure? None of you are poisoned!"
translations.zh: 「說什麼解毒？汝等沒有一個中毒！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
"Aye, $Y, I can tell that thou art poisoned."
"Wilt thou make an offering of 10 gold?"
Laying hands upon $Y, Tobatha removes the poison.
translations.zh: 托芭莎將手覆於$Y身上，為其除去毒素。

translations.en: "Well if thou won't pay, thou won't get cured!"
translations.zh: 「哼，若汝不肯付錢，就別想得到解毒！」

translations.en: "You youngsters think everything should be free!"
translations.zh: 「汝等年輕人以為什麼都是免費的！」

translations.en: "Thou art not too bad, for a youngster."
"All right, I'll cure ye."
Laying hands upon $Y, Tobatha removes the poison.
translations.zh: 托芭莎將手覆於$Y身上，為其除去毒素。

translations.en: "Well, ain't that just like youngsters?"
"Makin' mistakes and expecting their elders to bail them out."
translations.zh: 「犯了錯，還指望長輩替他們收拾爛攤子。」

translations.en: "Well, today's your lucky day."
"Wilt thou make an offering of 400 gold?"
"Then go see a gravedigger. I'll reckon his price'll be lower."
translations.zh: 「那便去找掘墓人吧，老身猜他的要價更低。」

translations.en: "That ain't enough money."
"Thou art #1 gold piece\s short."
"Go see a gravedigger. I'll reckon his price'll be lower."
translations.zh: 「去找掘墓人吧，老身猜他的要價更低。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection for their fallen comrade.
translations.zh: 汝的隊伍為倒下的同伴湊齊了費用。

translations.en: Tobatha lays hands upon the corpse...
translations.zh: 托芭莎將手覆於屍體之上……

translations.en: "Doman..."
"thixus..."
"anretu!"
And the dead live again!
"I see that $Y's got another one."

translator_notes: 081 Tobatha: 崔西克老婦醫者，暴躁但心善。口頭禪「年輕人」「老身」統一。咒語以音譯處理。
